title: How to set status and notify someone based on Vote column
excerpt: Hello, I have a board where someone (e.g., initiator) can submit a form and create a new pulse that needs to go through an approval process. I’m looking to document the approval of 5 voting members. However, only 3/5 nee…

posts.author: iElizabeth77 (Elizabeth Smeller)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I have a board where someone (e.g., initiator) can submit a form and create a new pulse that needs to go through an approval process. I’m looking to document the approval of 5 voting members. However, only 3/5 need to approve/reject in order for the project itself to move to approved/rejected status. I was hoping to set up an automation to say when 3/5 approvals or rejects have been received to update the status and then notify the initiator. Is this possible? Thanks in advance!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @iElizabeth77 - welcome to the community!

This is possible for sure. Not sure how you are tallying the approvals (I am assuming a vote column). What you can do is have a number column (I called it Approval Count) then use the following automations:

image1241×271 28.5 KB

Hope this helps!
Mark

posts.author: iElizabeth77 (Elizabeth Smeller)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much! This worked! Yay!
